title: 10 health benefits of Lavandula stoechas (spanish lavender)
intro: Lavandula stoechas, also known as Spanish lavender, has health benefits such as calming and soothing effects due to its rich presence of linalool and linalyl acetate. These essential oils help alleviate stress, anxiety, and insomnia, promoting a restful night's sleep and improved mood. By using Spanish lavender in aromatherapy, teas, or topical creams, individuals can experience relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and menstrual cramps, ultimately enhancing their overall well-being and quality of life.
